claim: Rock Werchter 2026 runs July 2-5 in Werchter with headliners The Cure, Twenty One Pilots, Mumford & Sons, Gorillaz and a four-day camping format.
quote: Rock Werchter 2026 lineup so far: The Cure, Twenty One Pilots, Mumford & Sons, The xx, The Prodigy, Lewis Capaldi, Gorillaz, Moby — Jul 2-5, 2026

claim: Tomorrowland 2026 takes place at De Schorre in Boom across two weekends, July 17-19 and July 24-26, themed CONSCIENCIA.
quote: Tomorrowland Belgium will return to Boom across the weekends of 17 to 19 and 24 to 26 July 2026, with the new theme 'CONSCIENCIA'.

claim: Tomorrowland 2026 features over 500 acts across 16 stages with headliners Calvin Harris, David Guetta, Armin van Buuren, Martin Garrix; official passes already sold out.
quote: Tomorrowland Belgium 2026 will see performances from over 500 acts across 16 stages including Calvin Harris, David Guetta, Armin van Buuren, Martin Garrix; official festival passes are sold out.

claim: Gent Jazz 2026 runs July 2-18 at the Bijloke site in Ghent with Main Stage indoor and Garden Stage outdoor across 17 days; a ticket grants access to all concerts on its day, minimum seven concerts.
quote: Gent Jazz 2026 — Bijloke site, two stages: the Main Stage (indoor) and the Garden Stage (outdoor). A concert ticket grants access to all concerts on the day for which you purchased a ticket. Valid for a minimum of seven concerts.

claim: Gent Jazz 2026 programme includes Terence Blanchard & Ravi Coltrane, Celeste, Marcus Miller, Alabama Shakes, Patti Smith Quartet, Suzanne Vega, Fatoumata Diawara and Ludovico Einaudi (July 14-15).
quote: Gent Jazz 2026 features Terence Blanchard & Ravi Coltrane, Celeste, Marcus Miller, Alabama Shakes, Patti Smith Quartet, John Hiatt, Suzanne Vega, Fatoumata Diawara; Ludovico Einaudi performs July 14 and 15.

claim: Pukkelpop 2026 (PKP26) runs August 20-23 in Kiewit, Hasselt as a four-day camping festival.
Pukkelpop 2026 lineup includes Tyler The Creator, Florence + The Machine, Deftones, Turnstile, Yungblud, Zara Larsson, Major Lazer and Underworld — alt-rock and electronic-leaning crowd.
quote: Pukkelpop 2026 lineup: Tyler, The Creator, Sombr, Zara Larsson, Yungblud, Florence + The Machine, Deftones, Turnstile, Major Lazer, Adriatique, Underworld, Amyl and The Sniffers, Pendulum

claim: Couleur Café 2026 runs June 26-28 in Brussels (Atomium) as an urban world-music festival mixing reggae, hip-hop, soul with global food market — non-camping, day-trip-friendly.
quote: Couleur Café — Brussels' urban world music festival showcasing reggae, hip-hop, soul against the backdrop of the Atomium, with a renowned global food market

claim: Couleur Café 2026 lineup includes Rema, Ezra Collective, Lila Iké, Ruger, Skepta and Freddie Gibbs.
quote: Couleur Café 2026 — Jun 26-28, 2026, Brussels, Belgium. Lineup: Rema, Ezra Collective, Lila Iké, Ruger, Skepta, Freddie Gibbs

claim: OdeGand on Saturday September 19, 2026 launches Festival Flanders Ghent with around 60 indoor and open-air concerts at 15 locations across world music and classical, navigated by boat or on foot.
quote: OdeGand — Saturday in September. 60 indoor and open-air concerts over 15 great locations, varied music genres from world music to classical music; travel by boat or walk between concerts

claim: Lokerse Feesten 2026, the 51st edition, runs July 31 to August 9 in Lokeren with city-park headliners including Lenny Kravitz, Diana Ross, Editors, Suede, The Streets, Tom Odell and Lost Frequencies.
quote: Lokerse Feesten 2026: 31 July to 9 August 2026, 51st edition. July 31 Diana Ross; Aug 5 The Kooks + Tom Odell; Aug 7 Editors + Suede; Aug 8 Lenny Kravitz; Aug 9 Lost Frequencies

claim: Cactusfestival 2026 (43rd edition) runs July 10-12 in Bruges' Minnewaterpark, single-stage with Madness, Editors, Kevin Morby, Aldous Harding, Goose, Osees and The Afghan Whigs — small and scenic.
quote: Cactusfestival 2026 — 10, 11 and 12 July 2026 in Bruges' Minnewaterpark; all artists play a full set on one stage. Lineup: Madness, Editors, Kevin Morby, Aldous Harding, The Afghan Whigs, Osees

claim: Polé Polé Ghent runs July 17-26 during Gentse Feesten on Korenlei and Graslei, free open-air world/pop/latin music by the water — date-night-friendly with no ticket needed.
quote: Polé Polé will take place from 17 until 26 July 2026 during The Ghent Festivities, bringing the best of pop, latin and world music in an extraordinary setting at the historic Graslei

claim: Jazz Middelheim 2026 runs May 23-25 (Pentecost weekend) in Park Den Brandt, Antwerp with Cécile McLorin Salvant, Marcos Valle, Chris Potter Trio and Collier plays Coltrane in a garden setting.
quote: From 23 to 25 May 2026, Park Den Brandt once again becomes a place to listen, wander and reconnect with music; Saturday Flea & The Honora Band; Sunday Cécile McLorin Salvant, Marcos Valle; Monday Collier plays Coltrane, Chris Potter Trio

claim: Klarafestival 2026, Belgium's biggest classical music festival, runs March 20-29 across BOZAR, Flagey, deSingel Antwerp and Concertgebouw Brugge — already wrapped before the April 29 cutoff.
quote: Klarafestival | 20 - 29.03.2026 — concerts at BOZAR, Flagey, deSingel Antwerp and Concertgebouw Brugge

claim: Boomtown Ghent runs July 17-23, 2026 during Gentse Feesten with free performances on Kouter and ticketed Handelsbeurs concerts; capped at 3,500/day, focus on young Belgian and emerging international talent.
quote: Boomtown 2026 will be transformed into a true village, where conviviality and music are prioritized for 3,500 visitors per day. Free on Kouter; Handelsbeurs concerts ticketed via Ha Concerts

claim: Sfinks Mixed 2026 runs July 23-26 in Boechout near Antwerp as a free four-day world-music festival with kids village; Sfinks Mundial sister event May 14, 2026 (Ascension Day).
quote: 23 + 24 + 25 + 26 JULI 2026 — Sfinks Mixed Boechout, four-day free festival with adventurous world music, world market, Kidz Village; Sfinks Mundial 14 May 2026 Ascension Day

claim: Gentse Feesten 2026 runs July 17-26 with free street music, world music (Polé Polé), jazz, theatre across Ghent's historic centre — over 1.3M visitors annually.
quote: Gentse Feesten 2026 — 17 to 26 July 2026, free since 1843, over 1.3 million visitors with more than 100,000 visitors per day; free music, street theatre, parades

claim: Festival Dranouter 2026 runs August 7-9 in West-Flanders village Dranouter as a folk festival, with Sylvie Kreusch and Katherine Priddy among confirmed artists.
quote: Dranouter Festival 2026 — Friday 07 August 2026 to Sunday 09 August 2026; folk festival in Belgian village of Dranouter; Sylvie Kreusch, Katherine Priddy confirmed
